task: Search for in-person, full-time jobs within 10 miles of ZIP code 14810 that allow Quick Apply.
final_result_response:
Successfully navigated to ZipRecruiter and applied all requested filters. Here's a summary:

**Search performed on ZipRecruiter** (https://www.ziprecruiter.com/jobs-search?search=&location=Bath%2C+NY&radius=10&days=&refine_by_employment=employment_type%3Afull_time&refine_by_location_type=no_remote&refine_by_salary=&refine_by_salary_ceil=&refine_by_apply_type=has_zipapply)

**Active Filters:**
- 📍 Location: Bath, NY (ZIP code 14810)
- 📏 Distance: Within 10 miles
- 🏢 Work Type: On-site / In-person only
- ⏰ Employment Type: Full-time
- ⚡ Apply Type: Quick Apply only

**Result: 118 jobs found** matching all criteria, including roles such as Carpenter, CNC Machinist, Finish Carpenter, Septic Installation Lead Technician, Inside Sales Associate, and Special Education Teachers — all within 10 miles of ZIP 14810, full-time, in-person, and Quick Apply eligible.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wants to search for in-person (no remote), full-time jobs within 10 miles of ZIP code 14810 (Bath, NY) that allow Quick Apply on ZipRecruiter.

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to ZipRecruiter, searched with location "Bath, NY" (ZIP 14810), opened the filters modal, and applied all four required filters: Quick Apply only, On-site (no remote), 10mi radius, and Full-Time employment type. After applying filters, the results page showed 118 matching jobs with a URL that encodes all filters: radius=10, refine_by_employment=employment_type:full_time, refine_by_location_type=no_remote, refine_by_apply_type=has_zipapply. The agent reported 118 jobs found with sample job listings (Carpenter, CNC Machinist, etc.).

**Evidence:** Step 16 shows the filter modal with all required options visible. Steps 17-20 confirm each filter was selected: Quick Apply only (3465), On-site (3477), 10mi distance (3501), Full Time (3657). Step 21 verified all selections were active before applying. Step 22 shows the Apply Filters button was clicked and the URL changed to include all filter parameters. Step 23 confirms the results page showing 118 jobs with all four filters active. The URL change is definitive proof: it contains radius=10, employment_type:full_time, no_remote, and has_zipapply. There is a minor degraded integrity status from one element-not-found error at step 7, but the agent recovered and completed the task successfully.

**Summary:** The agent successfully applied all four required filters (in-person/no-remote, full-time, 10-mile radius, Quick Apply) on ZipRecruiter and found 118 matching jobs. The URL and step files provide direct evidence that all filters were correctly set and applied.
